## 📋 Today's Overview
*May 14, 2026*

### Superconductivity (20 new today)

1. The study focuses on superconductor/ferromagnet/superconductor Josephson junctions with rare-earth intermetallic magnets, employing the anomalous phase shift \(\varphi_0\) to address the implementation and control of the zero-field Josephson diode effect.
2. The study focuses on superconducting qubits, employing energy-selective local reservoirs via parametrically driven coupling to readout resonators to address the stabilization and control of quantum states through engineered dissipation.
3. The study focuses on time-reversal symmetric bands formed by Machida-Shibata states in atomic cages on superconductors, employing hybridization analysis and electronic topological theory to address the formation of topological superconductivity.
4. The study focuses on a van der Waals ferromagnet coupled to a superconducting resonator, employing microwave spectroscopy to address the challenge of achieving magnon-photon hybridization in two-dimensional materials.
5. The study focuses on flat-band superconductors, employing quantum geometric analysis under time-reversal symmetry to address the characteristic superconducting length scales governed by interactions and quantum geometry.
6. The study focuses on superconducting honeycomb lattices with space-time inversion symmetry, employing band topology analysis to address the emergence of Euler topology from s-wave spin-singlet and f-wave spin-triplet pairings.
7. The study focuses on bilayer Ruddlesden-Popper nickelate films, employing epitaxial strain stabilization to address the experimental realization of ambient-pressure superconductivity in this platform.
8. The study focuses on two remote superconducting transmon qubits connected via lossy auxiliary cavities, employing a loss-induced interference scheme to address the achievement of nonreciprocity and nonreciprocal entanglement.
9. The study focuses on charge-density-wave order in high-Tc cuprates, employing resonant soft x-ray scattering combined with a coherent Bragg diffraction analysis to address the role of superconductivity in enhancing CDW phase coherence.
10. The study focuses on systems with multi-component order parameters, employing an unbiased large-\(N\) approach to address the competition and onset of vestigial phases from density-wave and superconducting instabilities.
11. The study focuses on superfluid-superconducting vortex states in the outer core of neutron stars, employing an extended mean-field theory to address the characterization of these states at arbitrary pressures with unequal critical temperatures.
12. The study focuses on the superconducting proximity effect at realistic interfaces, employing a first-principles real-space embedding theory to address the computationally prohibitive predictive description of Cooper pair penetration.
13. The study focuses on freestanding GdBa2Cu3O7 superconducting thin films, employing an optimized buffer layer design with a water-soluble sacrificial layer to address the preservation of superconducting properties during the lift-off process.
14. The study focuses on a Rashba superconductor thin film with ferromagnetic insulators, employing a theoretical model of circular super-currents to address the mediation of long-range magnetic interactions by superconductivity.
15. The study focuses on quantized magnon modes in a YIG microstructure coupled to a superconducting

| 1 | **[Anomalous phase shift and superconducting diode effect in Josephson junctions via thin films of rare-earth intermetallic magnets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.18990v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The superconductor/ferromagnet/superconductor (S/F/S) Josephson junctions (JJs) with an anomalous ground state phase shift $\varphi_0 \neq 0,π$ ($\varphi_0$-S/F/S JJs) enable the implementation of the zero-field Josephson diode effect with the possibility to control the diode efficiency and polarity. It is just as important that in this case $\varphi_0$ provides a coupling between the superconducting phase and the magnetization of the interlayer. Such $\varphi_0$-S/F/S JJs can be used for superconducting memory and logic circuit applications. Here we present the results of theoretical calculation of the current-phase relationship (CPR), exhibiting the Josephson diode effect and $\varphi_0\neq 0,π$, for a JJ through a specific magnetic material. As the interlayer of the JJ we consider an ultra-thin film of intermetallic lanthanide ($Ln$)-based compound $\mathrm{GdIr_2Si_2}$. Using the density functional theory (DFT) methods, we study the electronic structure and magnetic properties of the film. Then the effective tight-binding Hamiltonian (TBH), demonstrating high quantitative consistency with the electronic properties obtained from DFT calculations, is constructed. The TBH is used to calculate CPR in the framework of the Bogolubov-de Gennes approach. The CPRs demonstrate a pronounced $\varphi_0$ of the order of unity and a pronounced Josephson diode effect with the diode efficiency $ \lesssim 0.3$. Moreover, the efficiency can be controlled via rotation of in-plane magnetization in the interlayer. The prospects for utilizing alternative magnetic $Ln$-based materials of the $LnT_2X_2$ family ($T$ is a transition metal and $X$ is a $p$-element from groups III-V) for the implementation in $\varphi_0$-S/F/S JJs are also discussed.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>具有反常基态相移 $\varphi_0 \neq 0,π$ 的超导/铁磁/超导 (S/F/S) 约瑟夫森结 (JJs) ($\varphi_0$-S/F/S JJs) 能够实现零场约瑟夫森二极管效应，并可控制二极管效率与极性。同样重要的是，在此情况下 $\varphi_0$ 提供了超导相位与中间层磁化强度之间的耦合。此类 $\varphi_0$-S/F/S JJs 可用于超导存储器和逻辑电路应用。本文针对通过特定磁性材料的约瑟夫森结，展示了展现约瑟夫森二极管效应及 $\varphi_0\neq 0,π$ 的电流-相位关系 (CPR) 的理论计算结果。我们考虑将金属间镧系 ($Ln$) 基化合物 $\mathrm{GdIr_2Si_2}$ 的超薄薄膜作为 JJ 的中间层。利用密度泛函理论 (DFT) 方法，我们研究了薄膜的电子结构和磁性质。随后构建了有效紧束缚哈密顿量 (TBH)，该哈密顿量与 DFT 计算获得的电子性质具有高度定量一致性。在 Bogolubov-de Gennes 方法框架下，使用 TBH 计算了 CPR。CPR 展现出数量级约为 1 的显著 $\varphi_0$ 以及明显的约瑟夫森二极管效应，二极管效率 $\lesssim 0.3$。此外，可通过旋转中间层内的面内磁化强度来控制该效率。本文还讨论了利用 $LnT_2X_2$ 族 ($T$ 为过渡金属，$X$ 为 III-V 族 p 元素) 中替代性磁性 $Ln$ 基材料在 $\varphi_0$-S/F/S JJs 中实现应用的潜力。</p></details> | 2026-05-12 | G. A. Bobkov et al. |
| 2 | **[Entangling Superconducting Qubits via Energy-Selective Local Reservoirs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12429v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Engineered dissipation provides a powerful route to controlling and stabilizing quantum states in open systems. Superconducting circuits are particularly suited to this approach due to their tunable coupling to dissipative environments. Here we realize programmable local reservoirs for superconducting qubits through parametrically driven coupling to readout resonators, creating energy-selective incoherent pump and loss. Using coupled superconducting qubits, we autonomously stabilize entangled single-excitation states with fidelity up to 90.8%. We probe the stabilization dynamics under varying initial conditions and bath parameters, and implement robust classical shadow estimation for accurate and scalable state characterization. Finally, we numerically study a configuration where the engineered pump and loss share a common dissipative mode, leading to reservoir-mediated interference and classically correlated steady states. Our results demonstrate a scalable and hardware-efficient framework for dissipative preparation and control of correlated many-body states in superconducting circuits.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>工程耗散为控制和稳定开放系统中的量子态提供了一条强大途径。超导电路因其与耗散环境的可调谐耦合而特别适用于此方法。本文通过参量驱动耦合到读取谐振器，实现了超导量子比特的可编程局域库，从而产生能量选择性的非相干泵浦和损耗。利用耦合的超导量子比特，我们自主稳定了纠缠的单激发态，保真度高达 90.8%。我们探测了不同初始条件和库参数下的稳定化动力学，并实现了鲁棒的经典阴影估计，用于精确且可扩展的状态表征。最后，我们数值研究了一种配置，其中工程化泵浦和损耗共享一个共同的耗散模式，导致库介导的干涉和经典关联的稳态。我们的结果展示了一个可扩展且硬件高效的框架，用于超导电路中关联多体态的耗散制备与控制。</p></details> | 2026-05-12 | Qihao Guo et al. |
| 3 | **[Time-reversal symmetric topological superconductivity in Machida-Shibata lattices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.08674v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Recent experiments engineered special spin-degenerate Andreev bound states in atomic cages of adatoms on superconductors, the Machida-Shibata states, a promising building block for quantum matter. Here, we investigate the formation of time-reversal symmetric bands by hybridizing multiple such states and analyzing their electronic topological properties assuming small on-site electron repulsion. The low-energy theory shows that competing emerging singlet and triplet superconducting pairings drive the formation of topologically non-trivial phases in symmetry class DIII. We, therefore, predict Kramers pairs of Majorana zero modes appear at the ends of Machida-Shibata chains, while two-dimensional lattices host helical Majorana edge modes. Additionally, we discover extended regions in the Brillouin zone with vanishing superconducting pairings, which are lifted by the repulsive electron interactions. Our findings offer new perspectives for manipulating topological superconductivity and pairings in non-magnetic adatom systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>最近的实验在超导体上吸附原子的原子笼中工程化出了特殊的自旋简并安德烈夫束缚态——町田-柴田态，这是量子物质的一个有前景的构建单元。本文研究了通过杂化多个此类态来形成时间反演对称能带，并假设在小在位电子排斥作用下分析其电子拓扑性质。低能理论表明，竞争性的新兴单重态和三重态超导配对驱动了对称性类别 DIII 中非平凡拓扑相的形成。因此，我们预测在町田-柴田链的末端会出现马约拉纳零模式的克拉默斯对，而二维晶格则承载螺旋马约拉纳边缘模。此外，我们在布里渊区发现了超导配对消失的扩展区域，这些区域由排斥性电子相互作用所提升。我们的发现为在非磁性吸附原子系统中操控拓扑超导性和配对提供了新视角。</p></details> | 2026-05-12 | Ioannis Ioannidis et al. |
| 4 | **[Magnon polaritons in a van der Waals ferromagnet coupled to a superconducting resonator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.12298v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Achieving magnon-photon hybridization in the microwave regime is essential for integrating magnetic excitations with superconducting circuits. While this has been extensively demonstrated in bulk magnetic systems, realizing it in two-dimensional van der Waals materials remains challenging due to their reduced magnetic volume and increased dissipation. Here, magnon-photon hybridization is observed in exfoliated flakes of the van der Waals ferromagnet Cr$_2$Ge$_2$Te$_6$, with thicknesses down to 30 nm. The resulting magnon polaritons-hybrid excitations of cavity photons and magnons-are evidenced by reproducible avoided crossings across six devices, enabled by a low-impedance superconducting resonator design. The coupling strength follows the expected square-root dependence on thickness, and extrapolation of this scaling indicates that hybridization in the monolayer limit is within reach.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在微波波段实现磁子-光子杂化对于将磁激发与超导电路集成至关重要。尽管这在块体磁性系统中已被广泛证实，但由于其磁体积减小和耗散增加，在二维范德华材料中实现这一目标仍然具有挑战性。本文在剥离的范德华铁磁体 Cr$_2$Ge$_2$Te$_6$ 薄片中观测到了磁子-光子杂化，厚度低至 30 nm。由此产生的磁子极化激元——腔光子和磁子的杂化激发——通过六个器件中可重复的避免交叉现象得到证实，这得益于低阻抗超导谐振器设计。耦合强度遵循预期的厚度平方根依赖关系，对该标度关系的外推表明，在单层极限下实现杂化是触手可及的。</p></details> | 2026-05-12 | Alvaro Bermejillo-Seco et al. |
| 5 | **[Correlation lengths of flat-band superconductivity from quantum geometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.12969v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Flat-band superconductors provide a regime in which kinetic energy is quenched, so that pairing is governed primarily by interactions and quantum geometry. We investigate characteristic superconducting length scales in all-flat-band systems under the assumptions of time-reversal symmetry and spatially-uniform pairing, focusing on the size of the lowest-lying two-body bound state, the average Cooper-pair size, and the zero-temperature coherence length in two-band Hubbard models. Using the Creutz ladder and the $χ$ lattice as representative examples, we show that both the two-body bound-state size and the many-body Cooper-pair size remain finite and small in the weak-coupling limit, being controlled by the quantum metric of the flat bands. By contrast, the coherence length exhibits qualitatively distinct behavior, diverging in the dilute limit and in the vicinity of insulating regimes. These results demonstrate that, in flat-band superconductors, the pair size and the coherence length are fundamentally distinct physical quantities and highlight the central role of band geometry in shaping superconducting length scales when kinetic energy is quenched.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>平带超导体提供了一个动能被抑制的体系，因此配对主要由相互作用和量子几何决定。我们研究了全平带系统中在时间反演对称性和空间均匀配对假设下的特征超导长度尺度，重点关注最低两体束缚态的大小、平均库珀对大小以及两带哈伯德模型中的零温相干长度。以克罗伊茨梯子和 $\chi$ 晶格为代表实例，我们表明，在弱耦合极限下，两体束缚态大小和多体库珀对大小均保持有限且很小，受平带的量子度规控制。相比之下，相干长度表现出性质上不同的行为，在稀薄极限和绝缘区域附近发散。这些结果表明，在平带超导体中，对大小和相干长度是根本不同的物理量，并突显了当动能被抑制时能带几何在塑造超导长度尺度中的核心作用。</p></details> | 2026-05-12 | S. S. Elden et al. |
| 6 | **[Euler Topology in Superconducting Honeycomb Lattices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11587v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Electronic bands in systems with space-time inversion (IST) symmetry can host nontrivial Euler topology. Here, we investigate the band topology of IST-symmetric superconducting honeycomb lattices and demonstrate that s-wave spin-singlet (SWSS) and f-wave spin-triplet (FWST) superconducting pairings give rise to valley-Euler and Euler superconductors, respectively. We find that Euler topology in both pairing states gives rise to mirror-symmetry-protected helical domain-wall modes. Furthermore, we show that Euler topology in the FWST state induces non-Abelian braiding of Dirac nodes in momentum space when anisotropic hopping is introduced. Our work establishes superconducting electronic instabilities as a natural route to realizing nontrivial Euler band topology in Dirac materials.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>具有时空反演对称性的系统中的电子能带可以承载非平凡的欧拉拓扑。本文研究了具有时空反演对称性的超导蜂窝晶格的能带拓扑，并证明s波自旋单态和f波自旋三重态超导配对分别导致谷欧拉超导体和欧拉超导体。我们发现，两种配对态中的欧拉拓扑都会产生镜面对称保护的螺旋畴壁模式。此外，我们证明，在引入各向异性跳跃时，f波自旋三重态中的欧拉拓扑会在动量空间中诱导狄拉克节点的非阿贝尔编织。我们的工作确立了超导电子不稳定性是在狄拉克材料中实现非平凡欧拉能带拓扑的自然途径。</p></details> | 2026-05-12 | Rasoul Ghadimi et al. |
| 7 | **[Experimental Progress in Ambient-Pressure Superconducting Bilayer Nickelate Films](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11584v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Bilayer Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates display superconductivity near 80 K under high pressure, establishing a new nickelate platform for studying unconventional high-temperature superconductivity. The recent stabilization of superconducting RA3Ni2O7 (RA = rare earth or alkaline earth) films at ambient pressure has changed the experimental landscape: epitaxial strain can reproduce key structural ingredients of the high-pressure phase while making transport, spectroscopy, microscopy, and device-oriented measurements directly accessible. This Review summarizes the experimental progress on ambient-pressure superconducting bilayer nickelate films, with emphasis on synthesis routes, oxygen stoichiometry, substrate-induced strain, normal-state transport, superconducting properties, doping phase diagrams, and momentum-resolved electronic structure. We highlight several issues that remain unsettled, including the reproducibility of phase-pure ultrathin films, the microscopic origin of the two-step superconducting transition, the role of oxygen defects and substrate-derived doping, the position of the Ni 3dz2-derived γ band, and the pairing symmetry. We close by outlining experimental directions that could establish a more quantitative link among crystal structure, orbital reconstruction, and superconductivity in bilayer nickelate films.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>双层Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐在高压下表现出近80 K的超导电性，为研究非常规高温超导建立了新的镍酸盐平台。近期在常压下稳定制备超导RA₃Ni₂O₇薄膜改变了实验格局：外延应变可以重现高压相的关键结构要素，同时使输运、光谱、显微和面向器件的测量变得直接可行。本综述总结了常压超导双层镍酸盐薄膜的实验进展，重点涵盖合成路线、氧化学计量比、衬底诱导应变、正常态输运、超导特性、掺杂相图以及动量分辨电子结构。我们强调了若干尚未解决的问题，包括纯相超薄膜的可重复性、两步超导转变的微观起源、氧缺陷和衬底诱导掺杂的作用、Ni 3dz²衍生γ能带的位置以及配对对称性。最后，我们概述了能够在双层镍酸盐薄膜中建立晶体结构、轨道重构和超导电性之间更定量联系的实验方向。</p></details> | 2026-05-12 | Meng Zhang et al. |
| 8 | **[Loss-induced quantum nonreciprocity and entanglement in superconducting qubits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11457v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Losses are ubiquitous in physics and are usually regarded as harmful in quantum information processing. Here, we propose a loss-induced scheme to achieve nonreciprocity and nonreciprocal entanglement in a superconducting platform, where two remote superconducting transmon qubits are connected via two lossy auxiliary cavities. The nonreciprocity in our scheme originates from interference between multiple lossy coupling paths. The coherent phases associated with the qubit-resonator couplings reverse sign under propagation reversal, while the loss-induced phases remain direction independent. Their combined effect leads to different interference conditions in the opposite directions, resulting in unequal effective couplings. We show that this loss-induced scheme can generate nonreciprocal quantum entanglement, indicating that loss can be utilized as a resource. Moreover, the tunability of nonreciprocity and nonreciprocal entanglement in our scheme can be manipulated by the relative phase induced by loss, allowing to tailor both reciprocal and nonreciprocal behaviors. Our results establish a direct link between engineered loss and nonreciprocal entanglement in quantum information processing and offer potential applications in scalable quantum networks.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>损耗在物理学中普遍存在，在量子信息处理中通常被视为有害。本文提出一种基于损耗的方案，在超导平台上实现非互易性和非互易纠缠，其中两个远程超导transmon量子比特通过两个有损辅助腔连接。我们方案中的非互易性源于多个有损耦合路径之间的干涉。与量子比特-谐振器耦合相关的相干相位在传播方向反转时符号翻转，而损耗诱导的相位保持方向无关。它们的联合效应导致相反方向上不同的干涉条件，从而产生不相等的有效耦合。我们证明，这种损耗诱导方案可以产生非互易量子纠缠，表明损耗可以被用作一种资源。此外，我们方案中非互易性和非互易纠缠的可调性可以通过损耗诱导的相对相位进行操控，从而能够定制互易和非互易行为。我们的结果在量子信息处理中建立了工程化损耗与非互易纠缠之间的直接联系，并为可扩展量子网络提供了潜在应用。</p></details> | 2026-05-12 | Yu-Meng Ren et al. |
| 9 | **[Superconductivity Reinforces Charge-Density-Wave Phase Coherence across Cuprates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11401v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>For decades, superconductivity in high-Tc cuprates has been viewed as a competitor that suppresses charge-density-wave (CDW) order by reducing its amplitude and spatial extent. Here, we show that this picture is incomplete, as superconductivity is accompanied by a systematic enhancement of CDW phase coherence across multiple cuprate families. Using resonant soft x-ray scattering combined with a coherence-sensitive momentum-profile analysis, we uncover a BCS-like growth of phase coherence below Tc, which phenomenologically manifests as the absence of CDW peak broadening and near-perfect wave-vector locking. This enhancement remains visible even in a disorder-dominated regime created by long-term crystal aging and follows a common trend when compared with published data on Bi-, Hg-, Y-, and Nd-based cuprates. These results indicate that superconductivity reshapes CDW order in two distinct ways, suppressing its amplitude while strengthening its phase coherence, and reveal an additional phase-level interplay with lattice coupling in high-Tc cuprates.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>几十年来，高Tc铜氧化物中的超导电性一直被视为一种竞争者，通过降低电荷密度波序的振幅和空间范围来抑制它。本文表明，这一图景并不完整，因为超导电性伴随着多个铜氧化物家族中电荷密度波相位相干性的系统性增强。利用共振软X射线散射结合相干性敏感的动量分布分析，我们揭示了在Tc以下存在类似BCS的相位相干性增长，其现象学表现为电荷密度波峰展宽的消失和近乎完美的波矢锁定。即使在长期晶体老化造成的无序主导区域，这种增强仍然可见，并且与已发表的基于Bi、Hg、Y和Nd的铜氧化物数据相比，遵循共同的趋势。这些结果表明，超导电性以两种不同方式重塑电荷密度波序：抑制其振幅，同时增强其相位相干性，并揭示了高Tc铜氧化物中与晶格耦合的额外相位层面相互作用。</p></details> | 2026-05-12 | H. Lee et al. |
| 10 | **[Unbiased large-$N$ approach to competing vestigial orders of density-wave and superconducting instabilities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11281v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>When a primary order breaks multiple symmetries, partially ordered phases that only break a subset of those symmetries, known as vestigial phases, may onset at a higher temperature. This concept has been applied to a wide range of systems, including iron pnictides, cuprates, van der Waals antiferromagnets, doped topological insulators, and twisted bilayer graphene. In general, a multi-component primary order parameter (OP) supports multiple vestigial channels, each described by a quadratic (or higher-order) composite OP. However, the standard large-$N$ approach to the Ginzburg-Landau action of the primary OP has an intrinsic ambiguity in how one decouples the composite OPs, leading to situations in which one can seemingly enhance or eliminate altogether any vestigial instability. Here, we show that this ambiguity is a direct consequence of redundancy relations, such as Fierz identities, that relate different composite OPs, reflecting the fact that different vestigial channels interfere with each other and thus cannot be treated separately. To resolve this ambiguity, we propose an unbiased large-$N$ approach that respects both the redundancy relations and the underlying symmetry-group structure, and that gives unique values for the effective interactions of all vestigial channels. Our analysis reveals the generic existence of regions in the parameter space of quartic Landau coefficients where no vestigial order is stable, in contrast to the standard large-$N$ approach, but in agreement with weak-coupling and variational approaches. We illustrate our results by analyzing the vestigial orders of charge-density waves, spin-density waves, and multi-component superconductors in tetragonal, hexagonal, and cubic systems, respectively, revealing the presence of exotic vestigial phases describing spin-quadrupolar, charge-$4e$ superconducting, and altermagnetic orders.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>当主序参量破缺多个对称性时，仅破缺其中一部分对称性的部分有序相（称为残余相）可能在更高温度出现。这一概念已应用于多种系统，包括铁基超导体、铜氧化物、范德华反铁磁体、掺杂拓扑绝缘体和扭曲双层石墨烯。通常，多分量主序参量支持多个残余通道，每个通道由二次（或更高阶）复合序参量描述。然而，针对主序参量Ginzburg-Landau作用量的标准大N方法在如何解耦复合序参量方面存在内在歧义，导致看似可以增强或完全消除任何残余不稳定性的情况。本文表明，这种歧义是冗余关系（如Fierz恒等式）的直接结果，这些关系将不同的复合序参量联系起来，反映了不同残余通道相互干扰，因此不能单独处理。为解决这一歧义，我们提出了一种无偏的大N方法，该方法既尊重冗余关系又尊重底层对称群结构，并为所有残余通道的有效相互作用提供唯一值。我们的分析揭示了在四次Landau系数的参数空间中普遍存在某些区域，其中没有稳定的残余序，这与标准大N方法相反，但与弱耦合和变分方法一致。我们通过分析四方、六方和立方系统中电荷密度波、自旋密度波和多分量超导体的残余序来阐明我们的结果，揭示了描述自旋四极矩、电荷4e超导和交变磁序的奇异残余相的存在。</p></details> | 2026-05-11 | Grgur Palle et al. |
| 11 | **[The mean-field theory of superfluid-superconducting vortex states in the outer core of neutron stars](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11216v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Purpose: Characterize superfluid-superconducting vortex states at arbitrary pressures with $T_{cp}\neq T_{cn}$, assuming both proton and neutron mean-fields are formed by spin-0 Cooper pairs. Method: The existing mean-field theory is extended to account for $T_{cp}\neq T_{cn}$. The pressure dependence of the pairing gap energy $Δ_{\alpha0}$ is quantitatively established on the basis of the effective chiral field theory. To link $T_{cα}$ with $Δ_{\alpha0}$, I use the weak-coupling result $T_{cα}\approx0.57Δ_{\alpha0}$. A quadratic scaled-temperature ($T/T_{cp}$) dependence of the thermodynamic magnetic field is postulated in analogy with pure superconductors. The $T/T_{cα}$-dependence of the gap $Δ_{αT}$ is inferred from the many-body approximations for the pure neutron matter. Results: An empirical $T/T_{cα}$-dependence for the mean-field is constructed to account for the interplay between the condensation and the magnetic energies. The superfluid entrainment is found to increase the size of the vortex core and to decrease the effective magnetic penetration depth. The size of the neutron vortex core is found to be larger than the magnetic penetration depth in the outer core. Conclusions: The usual approximation of infinitely thin vortex line (the London's approximation) for the neutron vortex is found to be irrelevant in the entire outer core and for the proton vortex is found to be limited to vicinity of the crust-core transition. The developed mean-field theory paves the way to study the vortex microscopic structure, the angular momentum, the magnetization and the vortex-fluxtube interaction energy.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>目的：在假设质子和中子平均场均由自旋-0库珀对形成的前提下，表征任意压强下 $T_{cp}\neq T_{cn}$ 的超流-超导涡旋态。方法：将现有平均场理论扩展至考虑 $T_{cp}\neq T_{cn}$ 的情形。基于有效手征场论定量建立了配对能隙 $Δ_{\alpha0}$ 的压强依赖性。为关联 $T_{cα}$ 与 $Δ_{\alpha0}$，采用弱耦合结果 $T_{cα}\approx0.57Δ_{\alpha0}$。类比纯超导体，假设热力学磁场的二次方标度温度（$T/T_{cp}$）依赖性。从纯中子物质的多体近似推断出能隙 $Δ_{αT}$ 对 $T/T_{cα}$ 的依赖关系。结果：构建了平均场的经验 $T/T_{cα}$ 依赖关系以描述凝聚能与磁能之间的相互作用。发现超流曳引效应会增加涡旋核心尺寸并减小有效磁穿透深度。在外核心区域，中子涡旋核心尺寸大于磁穿透深度。结论：中子涡旋通常采用的无限细涡旋线近似（伦敦近似）在整个外核心区域均不适用，而质子涡旋的该近似仅限于地壳-核心过渡区附近。所发展的平均场理论为研究涡旋微观结构、角动量、磁化强度以及涡旋-磁通管相互作用能奠定了基础。</p></details> | 2026-05-11 | Dmitry Kobyakov et al. |
| 12 | **[First-principles real-space embedding theory of the superconducting proximity effect](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.11211v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>When a superconductor is placed in contact with a normal material, Cooper pairs penetrate the latter and induce superconductivity via the proximity effect. Despite its central role in quantum materials, superconducting devices and topological platforms, a predictive first-principles description of the proximity effect at realistic interfaces has remained computationally prohibitive so far. Here, we fill this gap by developing a Green's-function framework based on real-space dynamical embedding that enables first-principles simulations of superconducting proximity in mesoscopic systems. We show that the proximity effect admits a transparent diagrammatic formulation in terms of normal and anomalous embedding self-energies, which disentangle and quantify the distinct renormalization mechanisms generated by coupling to a superconducting bath. By combining this formalism with recursive schemes, we compute local spectral functions and proximity lengths extending over hundreds of nanometers into the bulk without resorting to thick interface slabs. We deploy the approach on tight-binding models (Qi-Hughes-Zhang and Fu-Kane-Mele), where we analyze mixed-parity superconductivity in topological insulators proximitized by $s$-wave superconductors, and on first-principles simulations of NbSe$_2$/CrBr$_3$ heterostructures based on density-functional theory and maximally-localized Wannier functions, the latter enabling direct comparison with scanning tunneling spectroscopy experiments. Our work provides a scalable and conceptually unified framework that bridges microscopic electronic structure and mesoscale proximity physics, enabling predictive atomistic simulations of superconducting interfaces.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>当超导体与正常材料接触时，库珀对会穿透后者并通过邻近效应诱导超导性。尽管邻近效应在量子材料、超导器件和拓扑平台中具有核心作用，但针对真实界面的可预测第一性原理描述至今在计算上仍难以实现。在此，我们通过发展基于实空间动力学嵌入的格林函数框架填补了这一空白，该框架能够对介观系统中的超导邻近效应进行第一性原理模拟。我们证明，邻近效应可通过正常和反常嵌入自能获得清晰的图解表述，从而解耦并量化由超导库耦合产生的不同重整化机制。通过将该形式与递归方案相结合，我们无需使用厚界面板即可计算延伸至体相数百纳米的局域谱函数和邻近长度。我们将该方法应用于紧束缚模型（Qi-Hughes-Zhang 和 Fu-Kane-Mele），分析了由 $s$ 波超导体邻近化的拓扑绝缘体中的混合宇称超导性，并基于密度泛函理论和最大局域化瓦尼尔函数对 NbSe$_2$/CrBr$_3$ 异质结构进行了第一性原理模拟，后者可直接与扫描隧道谱实验对比。我们的工作提供了一个可扩展且概念统一的框架，桥接了微观电子结构与介观邻近物理，实现了超导界面的预测性原子尺度模拟。</p></details> | 2026-05-11 | Nicolas Baù et al. |
| 13 | **[Freestanding GdBa2Cu3O7 Thin Films via Optimized Buffer Layer Design: Preserving Superconducting Properties](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10703v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Freestanding GdBa2Cu3O7 (GdBCO) superconducting thin films were fabricated using a water-soluble Sr3Al2O6 (SAO) sacrificial layer in combination with thermal release tape. An amorphous Al2O3 capping layer was introduced to suppress crack formation during the lift-off process. The influence of buffer-layer design inserted between the GdBCO and SAO layers was systematically investigated with respect to structural integrity and superconducting properties after lift-off. A LaAlO3/SrTiO3 bilayer buffer was found to be essential for maintaining epitaxial growth and a superconducting transition temperature (Tc) of approximately 92 K after lift-off, comparable to that of the as-grown films. In contrast, a reversed SrTiO3/LaAlO3 bilayer and single-layer buffer structures led to a suppression of Tc, highlighting the critical role of stacking sequence. These results demonstrate that optimization of the buffer-layer design is a key factor for realizing high-quality freestanding GdBCO films while maintaining their superconducting characteristics.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>利用水溶性 Sr3Al2O6 (SAO) 牺牲层结合热释放胶带制备了自支撑 GdBa2Cu3O7 (GdBCO) 超导薄膜。引入非晶 Al2O3 覆盖层以抑制剥离过程中的裂纹形成。系统研究了 GdBCO 与 SAO 层之间插入的缓冲层设计对剥离后结构完整性和超导性能的影响。发现 LaAlO3/SrTiO3 双层缓冲层对于维持外延生长和约 92 K 的超导转变温度（与生长态薄膜相当）至关重要。相反，反转的 SrTiO3/LaAlO3 双层及单层缓冲结构会导致 Tc 降低，凸显了堆叠顺序的关键作用。这些结果表明，优化缓冲层设计是实现高质量自支撑 GdBCO 薄膜同时保持其超导特性的关键因素。</p></details> | 2026-05-11 | Kazumasa Iida et al. |
| 14 | **[Superconductivity Mediated Long Range Magnetic Coupling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10139v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We study a Rashba superconductor thin film with ferromagnetic insulators (FIs) placed on top of it. We show that the ferromagnetic insulators generate circular super-currents, enabling long-range magnetic interactions (LRMI), decaying in power laws. In the static case, the long-range magnetic interaction can be ferromagnetic, in contrast to previous studies showing that superconductor mediates anti-ferromagnetic interactions decaying exponentially. Surprisingly, we find that in the dynamic case, the LRMI has a different distance dependence. Our results have potential applications in superconducting spintronics.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了顶部放置铁磁绝缘体 (FI) 的 Rashba 超导薄膜。结果表明，铁磁绝缘体会产生环形超流，从而引发呈幂律衰减的长程磁相互作用 (LRMI)。在静态情况下，长程磁相互作用可为铁磁性，这与先前研究显示超导体介导指数衰减的反铁磁相互作用形成对比。令人惊讶的是，我们发现动态情况下 LRMI 具有不同的距离依赖性。我们的结果在超导自旋电子学中具有潜在应用价值。</p></details> | 2026-05-11 | Ming Yan Wang et al. |
| 15 | **[Strong coupling between quantized magnon modes in a YIG microstucture and microwaves in a superconducting resonator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.28145v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Strong-coupling experiments based on magnons enable the exploration into on-chip demonstrations involving numerous long-lived excitations. Yttrium iron garnet (YIG) has been considered for decades as a gold standard material for magnonics due to its low-loss magnonic properties. While YIG has successfully demonstrated strong-coupling in macroscopic device geometries, the strong coupling of magnons in truly sub-10 micron YIG structures to date has not yet been realized. This obstacle is due to the difficulty producing large enough effective magnonic mode volume necessary primarily due to thickness limitations of YIG deposition and device fabrication techniques. Here, we demonstrate the use of a microplatelet of YIG, manufactured from a single crystal of YIG via focused ion beam (FIB) techniques, placed on a constricted inductive line of an optimized superconducting lumped element LC resonator to achieve strong coupling between numerous magnon modes and the LC resonator photons. These experimental findings are qualitatively backed by micromagnetic simulations and quantitatively supported by analytical calculations to identify the magnon modes corresponding to the experimentally observed anti-crossings in the microwave transmission signal. Further, we show that these anti-crossings remain even at incredibly low device input powers ($\leq 10$ fW). The fabrication techniques and device geometry enable the deterministic use of numerous confined magnon modes in micron-scale YIG structures for various magnetic field strengths and orientations at substantially reduced device powers. The results here establish a foundational path forward to achieving efficient magnon-based strong-coupling experiments in micron-scale YIG magnetic elements for effective on-chip studies.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>基于磁子的强耦合实验能够探索涉及大量长寿命激发的片上演示。钇铁石榴石 (YIG) 因其低损耗磁子特性，数十年来一直被认为是磁子学的黄金标准材料。尽管 YIG 已在宏观器件几何结构中成功实现强耦合，但真正亚10微米 YIG 结构中磁子的强耦合至今尚未实现。这一障碍源于难以产生足够大的有效磁子模式体积，主要受限于 YIG 沉积和器件制备技术的厚度限制。在此，我们展示了利用聚焦离子束 (FIB) 技术从 YIG 单晶制备的 YIG 微片，将其置于优化超导集总元件 LC 谐振器的收缩电感线上，实现了多个磁子模式与 LC 谐振器光子之间的强耦合。这些实验结果通过微磁模拟得到定性支持，并通过解析计算获得定量验证，以识别与微波传输信号中实验观测到的反交叉相对应的磁子模式。此外，我们证明这些反交叉即使在极低的器件输入功率（≤ 10 fW）下仍能保持。该制备技术和器件几何结构使得在不同磁场强度和方向下，能以显著降低的器件功率确定性利用微米级 YIG 结构中的多个受限磁子模式。本研究结果为在微米级 YIG 磁性元件中实现高效基于磁子的强耦合实验奠定了基础，从而推动有效的片上研究。</p></details> | 2026-05-11 | Seth W. Kurfman et al. |
| 16 | **[Correlation-Driven Orbital-Selective Fermiology and Superconductivity in the Bilayer Nickelate La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.10101v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Recent angle-resolved photoemission measurements on La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ have challenged the density-functional-theory-based picture of three Fermi surfaces by revealing that the $d_{z^2}$-derived $γ$ band can reside below the Fermi level. Motivated by this discrepancy, we investigate a realistic bilayer two-orbital Hubbard model using time-dependent variational principle (TDVP)-based cluster perturbation theory (CPT), alongside large-scale density matrix renormalization group (DMRG) calculations. Our TDVP-CPT calculations, performed on clusters of up to 16 physical sites, reveal that electronic correlations drive a pronounced orbital-selective reconstruction of the low-energy spectrum: the $d_{z^2}$ spectral weight is progressively depleted, the $γ$ band sinks below the Fermi level, and pseudogaps open on the remaining $α$ and $β$ bands, leaving Fermi arcs dominated by the $d_{x^2-y^2}$ orbital at strong coupling. Furthermore, large-scale DMRG calculations demonstrate that the leading superconducting correlations evolve consistently with this Fermi surface reconstruction, transitioning from $d_{z^2}$-dominated to $d_{x^2-y^2}$-dominated interlayer spin-singlet pairing while retaining an $s_{\pm}$ structure. Consequently, our results indicate that the disappearance of the $γ$ pocket is not detrimental to superconductivity; rather, it signals a correlation-driven shift of the pairing channel mediated by interlayer antiferromagnetism, Hund's coupling, and inter-orbital hybridization.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>近期对La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$的角分辨光电子能谱测量发现，$d_{z^2}$衍生的$\gamma$能带可位于费米能级以下，这对基于密度泛函理论的三费米面图像提出了挑战。受此差异启发，我们利用基于含时变分原理（TDVP）的团簇微扰理论（CPT）以及大规模密度矩阵重正化群（DMRG）计算，研究了一个实际的双层双轨道哈伯德模型。在多达16个物理格点的团簇上进行的TDVP-CPT计算表明，电子关联驱动了低能谱的显著轨道选择性重构：$d_{z^2}$谱权重逐渐耗尽，$\gamma$能带下沉至费米能级以下，剩余的$\alpha$和$\beta$能带上打开赝能隙，在强耦合下留下由$d_{x^2-y^2}$轨道主导的费米弧。此外，大规模DMRG计算表明，主要的超导关联随此费米面重构一致演化，从$d_{z^2}$主导转变为$d_{x^2-y^2}$主导的层间自旋单态配对，同时保持$s_{\pm}$结构。因此，我们的结果表明$\gamma$口袋的消失并不损害超导电性；相反，它标志着由层间反铁磁性、洪德耦合和轨道间杂化所介导的配对通道发生了关联驱动的转变。</p></details> | 2026-05-11 | Yong-Yue Zong et al. |
| 17 | **[Hole-Doping Suppresses Competing Magnetism in High-DOS C136 Carbon Schwarzite: A Computational Route Toward Superconductivity in Negative-Curvature Carbon Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09690v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Carbon schwarzites are negative-curvature carbon networks with electronic structures distinct from graphene, fullerenes, and conventional carbon allotropes. Here we report a spin-polarized first-principles screening study of D-type C136 carbon schwarzite focused on the competition between magnetism, doping, and high-DOS metallic behavior. Neutral C136 has a robust competing magnetic branch, with total magnetization of about 11.01-11.03 Bohr magnetons per 136-atom cell. Charged-cell calculations reveal a clear electron-hole asymmetry: adding two electrons per cell increases the total magnetization to 12.11 Bohr magnetons per cell, while removing two electrons reduces it to 9.61. Further hole doping suppresses the magnetic branch monotonically, giving 8.02, 6.34, and 4.76 Bohr magnetons per cell for removal of 4, 6, and 8 electrons, respectively. The most strongly hole-doped point, h8, was examined with spin-polarized NSCF and density-of-states calculations on a 4x4x4 k-point mesh. The NSCF Fermi energy, -0.7414 eV, agrees with the SCF value, -0.7413 eV. The DOS remains high near the Fermi level: at E = -0.740 eV, the total DOS is about 44.69 states/eV/cell, with DOS_up = 33.11 and DOS_down = 11.58 states/eV/cell. Thus h8 combines substantial suppression of the competing magnetic branch with preservation of a high-DOS metallic state. We do not claim superconductivity in C136. Instead, these calculations identify hole doping as a route for suppressing a competing magnetic instability while preserving electronic conditions relevant for further superconductivity screening. Lattice stability, electron-phonon coupling, and transition-temperature estimates remain open problems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>碳施瓦茨体是具有负曲率碳网络的材料，其电子结构不同于石墨烯、富勒烯和传统碳同素异形体。本文报道了对D型C136碳施瓦茨体进行的自旋极化第一性原理筛选研究，重点关注磁性、掺杂和高态密度金属行为之间的竞争。中性C136具有一个强竞争磁性分支，总磁化强度约为每136原子晶胞11.01-11.03玻尔磁子。带电晶胞计算揭示了明显的电子-空穴不对称性：每晶胞增加两个电子使总磁化强度升至12.11玻尔磁子，而移除两个电子则使其降至9.61。进一步空穴掺杂单调抑制了磁性分支，当分别移除4、6和8个电子时，总磁化强度分别为8.02、6.34和4.76玻尔磁子。对最强空穴掺杂点h8，我们在4×4×4的k点网格上进行了自旋极化的非自洽场和态密度计算。非自洽费米能为-0.7414 eV，与自洽场值-0.7413 eV一致。费米能级附近态密度仍然很高：在E = -0.740 eV处，总态密度约为44.69态/eV/晶胞，其中自旋向上态密度为33.11，自旋向下态密度为11.58态/eV/晶胞。因此，h8在抑制竞争磁性分支的同时，保留了高态密度的金属态。我们并未声称C136具有超导电性。相反，这些计算表明空穴掺杂是抑制竞争磁性不稳定性、同时保留与进一步超导筛选相关的电子条件的一种途径。晶格稳定性、电子-声子耦合和转变温度的估算仍是待解决的问题。</p></details> | 2026-05-10 | Eugene Yashin et al. |
| 18 | **[A Superconducting Levitating Oscillator with < 1 $μ$Hz Resonance Linewidth](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.09632v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Experiments aimed at quantifying the interface between quantum and classical physics necessarily require a high degree of isolation from the environment: wavefunction collapse and quantum gravity effects at laboratory scales are predicted to be very subtle. Ideally, such tests would be performed in a closed system at extremely low temperatures in order to rule out any external influence and thermal fluctuations. Cryogenic levitated macroscopic bodies are excellent candidates for an accurate laboratory approximation of such systems, as a tether to another body would violate the requirement for the system to be fully closed. Here we report a significant milestone on the way to a practically suitable approximation of such closed system. We have built a milligram-mass superconducting oscillator operating at millikelvin temperatures showing extremely low dissipation rate, with the oscillator ring-down time exceeding 110 hours. This corresponds to the resonance linewidth of less than 0.8 $μ$Hz. The experimental setup is highly tunable and is compatible with adiabatic nuclear demagnetisation, promising even lower temperatures and lower dissipation levels in the future. We demonstrate the capability of our device by measuring drag from $^3$He impurities in superfluid $^4$He at a level of $\sim10^{-8}$ with the drag force in the femtonewton range.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>旨在量化量子与经典物理之间界面的实验，必然要求与环境高度隔离：波函数坍缩和量子引力效应在实验室尺度上预计非常微妙。理想情况下，此类测试应在极低温度的封闭系统中进行，以排除任何外部影响和热涨落。低温悬浮宏观物体是此类系统在实验室中精确近似的优秀候选体，因为与其他物体的连接会违反系统完全封闭的要求。本文报告了在实现此类封闭系统实用化近似道路上的一个重要里程碑。我们构建了一个工作在毫开尔文温度下的毫克级超导振荡器，其耗散率极低，振荡器振铃衰减时间超过110小时。这对应于小于0.8微赫兹的共振线宽。该实验装置高度可调，并与绝热核去磁兼容，有望在未来实现更低的温度和更低的耗散水平。我们通过测量超流$^4$He中$^3$He杂质产生的阻力来展示该装置的能力，测量水平约为$10^{-8}$，阻力在飞牛顿量级。</p></details> | 2026-05-10 | M. Arrayás et al. |
| 19 | **[Third Quantization for Order Parameters (II): Local Field Quantization in Superconducting Quantum Circuits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.24092v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The quantization of superconducting transmission-line resonators is usually introduced phenomenologically by modeling the resonator as an effective LC circuit and imposing canonical commutation relations on macroscopic variables such as charge and flux. Although this approach is highly successful, it leaves open why these macroscopic variables should obey quantum commutation relations and how this behavior emerges from the superconducting state. In this work, starting from the microscopic pairing Hamiltonian underlying BCS superconductivity, we derive the low-energy effective Hamiltonian of a circuit-QED architecture containing a superconducting transmission line with distributed capacitive and inductive elements. We establish quantitative relations between macroscopic observables, including current and voltage, and the spatially local superconducting phase, as well as the microscopic parameters of the electron-phonon system. We then extend the third quantization of the superconducting order parameter, introduced in Paper (I) for the global phase, to the spatially local case. This gives a macroscopic field quantization of the superconducting phase. We show that, after restriction to the low-energy excitation subspace, the local superconducting phase becomes a genuine quantum dynamical variable. Thus, the quantum behavior of transmission-line resonators need not be postulated at the macroscopic level, but follows from the third quantization of the superconducting order parameter. These results suggest that capacitive and inductive superconducting circuit elements share the same microscopic origin, providing a unified framework for superconducting circuit quantization.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导传输线谐振腔的量子化通常是通过唯象方式引入的，即将谐振腔建模为有效LC电路，并对电荷和通量等宏观变量施加正则对易关系。尽管这种方法非常成功，但它并未阐明为何这些宏观变量应遵循量子对易关系，以及这种行为如何从超导态中涌现。在本工作中，我们从BCS超导背后的微观配对哈密顿量出发，推导了包含具有分布式电容和电感元件的超导传输线的电路量子电动力学架构的低能有效哈密顿量。我们建立了包括电流和电压在内的宏观可观测量与空间局域超导相位，以及电子-声子系统的微观参数之间的定量关系。然后，我们将论文(I)中针对全局相位引入的超导序参量的第三次量子化扩展到空间局域情形。这给出了超导相位的宏观场量子化。我们证明，在限制到低能激发子空间后，局域超导相位成为一个真正的量子动力学变量。因此，传输线谐振腔的量子行为无需在宏观层面进行假设，而是从超导序参量的第三次量子化中推导得出。这些结果表明，电容性和电感性超导电路元件具有相同的微观起源，为超导电路量子化提供了一个统一框架。</p></details> | 2026-05-09 | Miao-Miao Yi et al. |
| 20 | **[Quasiparticle Quality Factors in Superconducting Resonators: Effects of Bath Temperature and Readout Power](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08591v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The performance of superconducting resonators underpins a wide range of modern quantum technologies, yet their quality factor often deviates at low temperatures from standard Mattis-Bardeen predictions. This discrepancy is often attributed to nonthermal quasiparticles generated by microwave readout power, which limits the sensitivity of superconducting devices. We present a macroscopic model based on modified Rothwarf-Taylor equations that incorporates a power-dependent phonon generation term, providing an explicit relationship between quality factor, bath temperature and readout power. The model shows excellent agreement with temperature sweep measurements of NbN microstrip resonators with \b{eta}-Ta terminations over a wide dynamic range of readout power levels, accurately capturing the transition between thermally-dominated and microwave-induced loss regimes. This framework provides a predictive tool for optimizing superconducting resonators and advancing the design of high-Q devices for quantum sensing and quantum information processing.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导谐振腔的性能支撑着广泛的现代量子技术，然而其品质因数在低温下常常偏离标准马蒂斯-巴丁理论预测。这种偏差通常归因于微波读出功率产生的非热准粒子，这限制了超导器件的灵敏度。我们提出了一个基于修正的罗斯瓦尔特-泰勒方程的宏观模型，该模型包含了一个依赖功率的声子产生项，从而提供了品质因数、环境温度和读出功率之间的显式关系。该模型与带有$\beta$-Ta端接的NbN微带谐振腔在宽动态范围读出功率水平下的温度扫描测量结果吻合极好，准确地捕捉了热主导损耗与微波诱导损耗机制之间的转变。该框架为优化超导谐振腔以及推进用于量子传感和量子信息处理的高品质因数器件设计提供了预测性工具。</p></details> | 2026-05-09 | Zhenyuan Sun et al. |

### spin glass

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | **[Colossal Magnetoresistance and Phonon Driven Exchange Dynamics in Eu$_5$Sn$_2$As$_6$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06649v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The emergence of colossal magnetoresistance in a new generation of Eu$^{2+}$-based antiferromagnets is intriguing given stark contrasts to the archetypal perovskite manganites and doped Eu-chalcogenides. In this study the thermal conductivity and magnetostriction of Eu$_5$Sn$_2$As$_6$ -- one such representative -- have been measured to better understand the role of the crystal lattice. Both properties are strongly field-dependent and mirror the magnetization, saturating once the Eu$^{2+}$ moments are polarized. The field-enhancement of the phonon-dominated thermal conductivity is interpreted through the lifting of a degeneracy of spin configurations, and the subsequent saturation due to quenched magnetostrain in high field. Comparison with spin-glass insulators suggests that this phenomenon is not a byproduct but rather the driver of electron delocalization due to the suppression of strong phonon scattering arising from exchange frustration.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>新一代基于Eu²⁺的反铁磁体中巨磁电阻效应的出现令人关注，因其与典型钙钛矿锰氧化物及掺杂铕硫族化物存在显著差异。本研究测量了代表性材料Eu₅Sn₂As₆的热导率和磁致伸缩，以深入理解晶格的作用。两种性质均强烈依赖于磁场并与磁化强度同步变化，当Eu²⁺磁矩极化后达到饱和。声子主导热导率的磁场增强效应被解释为自旋构型简并的解除，而高场下的饱和则源于磁致伸缩应变的淬灭。与自旋玻璃绝缘体的比较表明，这一现象并非副产物，而是由于交换阻挫引起的强声子散射被抑制后，电子退局域化的驱动力。</p></details> | 2026-05-07 | Luke Pritchard Cairns et al. |
| 2 | **[Lecture Notes on Statistical Physics and Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06394v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>These lecture notes introduce some topics of classical statistical physics, particularly those that are relevant for neural networks and deep learning. Statistical physics is treated as a branch of probability theory or statistics, with the goal of making concepts such as phase transitions and the renormalization group accessible to readers without prior knowledge of physics. We introduce the Boltzmann-Gibbs distribution and the thermodynamic potentials on a finite configuration space, notably for Ising spins and spin-glass models on a lattice, and then define phase transitions as discontinuities that arise in the limit that the number of lattice points goes to infinity. We further introduce Hopfield networks and Boltzmann machines, which are governed by the same energy function as spin-glass models, and discuss the learning algorithm for restricted Boltzmann machines. In this algorithm hidden neurons are integrated out as in the renormalization group. Finally, modern deep learning is introduced, whose early developments were in part motivated by restricted Boltzmann machines in that they carry many layers of hidden neurons. A description of large language models is given.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>本讲义介绍经典统计物理学的若干主题，特别是与神经网络和深度学习相关的内容。我们将统计物理学视为概率论或统计学的一个分支，旨在使不具备物理学背景的读者也能理解相变和重正化群等概念。本文在有限构型空间上引入玻尔兹曼-吉布斯分布和热力学势，特别针对格点上的伊辛自旋和自旋玻璃模型，随后将相变定义为格点数量趋于无穷大时出现的间断性。进一步介绍受自旋玻璃模型相同能量函数支配的霍普菲尔德网络和玻尔兹曼机，并讨论受限玻尔兹曼机的学习算法。在该算法中，隐藏神经元如同重正化群中的积分过程被消去。最后介绍现代深度学习，其早期发展部分受限于多隐藏层结构的受限玻尔兹曼机，并给出大语言模型的描述。</p></details> | 2026-05-07 | Olaf Hohm et al. |
| 3 | **[Topological spin freezing in frustrated quantum materials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06069v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Competing interactions, non-trivial electronic band topology, quantum fluctuations, and the interplay between emergent degrees of freedom in frustrated quantum materials can give rise to a wide range of exotic phenomena. Glassy dynamics, originally studied in amorphous materials and biological systems, has recently attracted considerable interest in quantum condensed matter, particularly in relation to the collective behavior of spins, quasiparticle excitations, and topological spin textures. Here, we investigate the emergence of unconventional glassy spin dynamics in a broad class of frustrated quantum materials, where spin freezing exhibit distinct signatures in both thermodynamic and microscopic measurements. Using a comprehensive set of experimental probes, including thermodynamic, NMR, ($μ$SR), and neutron scattering, we identify characteristic signatures of topological spin-glass behavior and these complementary techniques reveal unconventional spin dynamics, short-range spin correlations, emergent low-energy excitations, and glassy behavior of topological origins, distinguishing these states from conventional spin glasses and disordered magnets. Furthermore, we discuss the role of hydrodynamic spin modes in governing glassy dynamics and the emergence of spin-jam states in frustrated lattices, providing a unified framework for understanding unconventional spin freezing of topological origin and bridging experimental observations with theoretical models. This review aims to advance our understanding of collective many-body phenomena arising from competing interactions, topological defects, collective excitations, quantum entanglement, and symmetry constraints. Such insights may facilitate the discovery and design of novel quantum materials and help address fundamental questions in contemporary condensed matter physics, with potential implications for future quantum technologies.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>阻挫量子材料中相互竞争的相互作用、非平凡电子能带拓扑、量子涨落以及涌现自由度之间的协同效应，可引发多种奇异现象。玻璃态动力学最初在非晶材料和生物系统中被研究，近期在量子凝聚态领域引起广泛关注，尤其涉及自旋、准粒子激发和拓扑自旋织构的集体行为。本文研究了一类广泛阻挫量子材料中非常规玻璃态自旋动力学的涌现，其自旋冻结在热力学和微观测量中均呈现独特特征。通过热力学、核磁共振、μ子自旋旋转和中子散射等综合实验手段，我们识别出拓扑自旋玻璃行为的特征信号，这些互补技术揭示了非常规自旋动力学、短程自旋关联、涌现低能激发及拓扑起源的玻璃态行为，从而将这些态与常规自旋玻璃和无序磁体区分开来。此外，我们讨论了流体力学自旋模式在支配玻璃态动力学中的作用以及阻挫晶格中自旋阻塞态的涌现，为理解拓扑起源的非常规自旋冻结提供了统一框架，并桥接了实验观测与理论模型。本综述旨在增进对竞争相互作用、拓扑缺陷、集体激发、量子纠缠和对称性约束所引发的集体多体现象的理解，这些见解可能促进新型量子材料的发现与设计，并有助于解决当代凝聚态物理学中的基本问题，对未来量子技术具有潜在影响。</p></details> | 2026-05-07 | U. Jena et al. |
| 4 | **[Unraveling the Origin of Ferrimagnetic Signatures in (Fe,Mn,Ga)2O3 Bixbyites: The Role of Structurally-Undetectable Spinel Impurities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05885v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The cubic Fe2-xMnxO3 is an intriguing material that has recently been investigated for various applications, including lithium-ion battery anodes, catalysts, energy storage media, humidity sensors, and photocatalysts. Despite its wide range of promising applications, the magnetic properties of Fe2-xMnxO3 remain controversial, with different sources reporting conflicting information regarding the type of magnetic ordering, phase transition temperature, and magnetic moment of this compound. This work presents a study of the magnetic state of three Fe2-xMnxO3:Ga solid solutions with varying Mn:Fe:Ga ratios, along with one gallium-free Fe2-xMnxO3 reference sample. We performed a detailed analysis of the actual chemical composition and crystal structure of the synthesized samples using energy-dispersive X-ray spectroscopy (EDX), powder X-ray diffraction (XRD), and X-ray absorption spectroscopy (XAS) to evaluate compositional differences. The magnetic states of the three Fe2-xMnxO3:Ga samples and the gallium-free Fe2-xMnxO3 were investigated using magnetometry and Mossbauer spectroscopy. The low-temperature magnetic anomalies were found to be more consistent with spin-glass-like freezing than with conventional long-range antiferromagnetic ordering. Although variations in magnetic behavior were observed and found to depend on composition and the cooling rate during synthesis, our results demonstrate that these factors do not account for the drastically different magnetic properties reported for similar bixbyite-type oxides. Instead, the apparent room-temperature ferrimagnetism observed in one sample is most likely extrinsic and can be attributed to a trace spinel-type impurity phase, as supported by magnetizations and ESR measurements. Thus, the origin of these discrepancies lies primarily in the chemical purity of the samples and, to a significant extent, in the synthesis technique employed.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>立方相Fe₂₋ₓMnₓO₃是一种引人关注的材料，近期被研究用于多种应用，包括锂离子电池负极、催化剂、储能介质、湿度传感器和光催化剂。尽管应用前景广阔，但Fe₂₋ₓMnₓO₃的磁性质仍存在争议，不同文献关于该化合物的磁有序类型、相变温度和磁矩报告了相互矛盾的信息。本研究对三种具有不同Mn:Fe:Ga比例的Fe₂₋ₓMnₓO₃:Ga固溶体以及一个无镓的Fe₂₋ₓMnₓO₃参考样品的磁态进行了研究。我们利用能量色散X射线光谱、粉末X射线衍射和X射线吸收光谱对合成样品的实际化学成分和晶体结构进行了详细分析，以评估成分差异。通过磁强法和穆斯堡尔谱研究了三种Fe₂₋ₓMnₓO₃:Ga样品和无镓Fe₂₋ₓMnₓO₃的磁态。低温磁异常更符合自旋玻璃类冻结而非传统的长程反铁磁有序。尽管观察到磁行为随成分和合成冷却速率变化，但我们的结果表明，这些因素并不能解释类似方铁锰矿型氧化物中报告的巨大磁性质差异。相反，在一个样品中观察到的表观室温亚铁磁性极有可能是外在的，可归因于痕量尖晶石型杂质相，磁化强度和电子自旋共振测量支持了这一结论。因此，这些差异的根源主要在于样品的化学纯度，并在很大程度上取决于所采用的合成技术。</p></details> | 2026-05-07 | Evgeniya Moshkina et al. |
| 5 | **[Frustrated Fields: Statistical Field Theory for Frustrated Brownian Particles on 2D Manifolds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.05366v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We develop a statistical field theory that describes the large-N limit of a system of Brownian particles with quenched random pairwise interactions on a compact two-dimensional Riemannian manifold. The resulting Frustrated Fields (F2) model is a non-linear field theory for a smooth self-interacting density field $ρ$ on the manifold, with local and non-local (in space and time) self-interactions characteristic of spin-glass dynamics. Particle simulations show \emph{adiabatic dimension reduction}: on $S^2$, the density concentrates on a slowly precessing great-circle ring whose orientation is a director ($\hat{\mathbf{n}} \sim -\hat{\mathbf{n}}$, even profile). Conditioned on this simulation-supported ring saddle and on a Born-Oppenheimer separation between the slow orientation and the gapped density fluctuations, symmetry fixes the low-energy dynamics to be the nonlinear sigma model (NLSM) on the real projective plane $S^2/\mathbb{Z}_2 = \mathbb{RP}^2$ (the $\mathbb{RP}^2$ NLSM on the projective rotor space) in $(0+1)$ dimensions, governed by a single low-energy constant, the rotational diffusion coefficient $D_{\text{rot}}$. With $D_{\text{rot}}$ and the static ring profile $f_0$ measured from particle simulations, the resulting effective theory reproduces multiple independent orientation- and density-sector diagnostics with no further adjustable parameters.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们发展了一种统计场论，描述紧致二维黎曼流形上具有淬火随机成对相互作用的布朗粒子系统的大N极限。由此产生的阻挫场模型是一种非线性的场论，用于描述流形上光滑自相互作用密度场ρ，其具有自旋玻璃动力学特征的局域和非局域（空间和时间上）自相互作用。粒子模拟展示了绝热维度约化：在S²上，密度集中于一个缓慢进动的大圆环上，其取向为指向矢（n̂ ~ -n̂，偶函数轮廓）。基于这一经模拟支持的环鞍点，以及慢取向与有能隙密度涨落之间的玻恩-奥本海默分离，对称性将低能动力学固定为(0+1)维实射影平面S²/ℤ₂ = ℝℙ²上的非线性西格玛模型（即投影转子空间上的ℝℙ² NLSM），由一个低能常数即转动扩散系数D_rot支配。利用粒子模拟测得的D_rot和静态环轮廓f₀，所得有效理论无需额外可调参数即可复现多个独立的取向和密度诊断结果。</p></details> | 2026-05-06 | Igor Halperin et al. |
| 6 | **[Microcanonical simulated annealing: Massively parallel Monte Carlo simulations with sporadic random-number generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.16240v4)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Numerical simulations of models and theories that describe complex systems such as spin glasses are becoming increasingly important. Beyond fundamental research, these computational methods also find practical applications in fields like combinatorial optimization. However, Monte Carlo simulations, an important subcategory of these methods, are plagued by a major drawback: they are extremely greedy for (pseudo) random numbers. The total fraction of computer time dedicated to random-number generation increases as the hardware grows more sophisticated, and can get prohibitive for special-purpose computing platforms. We propose here a general-purpose microcanonical simulated annealing (MicSA) formalism that dramatically reduces such a burden. The algorithm is fully adapted to a massively parallel computation, as we show in the particularly demanding benchmark of the three-dimensional Ising spin glass. We carry out very stringent numerical tests of the new algorithm by comparing our results, obtained on GPUs, with high-precision standard (i.e., random-number-greedy) simulations performed on the Janus II custom-built supercomputer. In those cases where thermal equilibrium is reachable (i.e., in the paramagnetic phase), both simulations reach compatible values. More significantly, barring short-time corrections, a simple time rescaling suffices to map the MicSA off-equilibrium dynamics onto the results obtained with standard simulations.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>描述自旋玻璃等复杂系统的模型与理论的数值模拟正变得日益重要。除基础研究外，这些计算方法还在组合优化等领域找到了实际应用。然而，作为这类方法重要分支的蒙特卡洛模拟存在一个主要缺陷：它们对（伪）随机数的需求极为贪婪。随着硬件日益精密，用于随机数生成的计算机时间占比不断增加，在专用计算平台上甚至可能达到令人望而却步的程度。本文提出一种通用型微正则模拟退火（MicSA）形式体系，可大幅减轻这一负担。该算法完全适配大规模并行计算，我们在要求尤为严苛的三维伊辛自旋玻璃基准测试中展示了这一点。通过将我们在GPU上获得的结果与在Janus II定制超级计算机上执行的高精度标准（即贪婪消耗随机数的）模拟结果进行对比，我们对新算法开展了极为严格的数值测试。在热平衡可达的情况下（即顺磁相），两种模拟获得了兼容的结果。更重要的是，除短时修正外，仅需简单的时间尺度变换即可将MicSA的非平衡动力学映射到标准模拟所得结果上。</p></details> | 2026-05-06 | M. Bernaschi et al. |
| 7 | **[The free energy limit of the SYK model at high temperature](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02768v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev (SYK) model is a disordered quantum mean-field model studied in condensed matter physics and the holographic theory of black holes. Its structural properties can be derived heuristically using a combination of the replica method and path integration techniques. Analyzing it mathematically rigorously, however, turned out to be notoriously difficult, even for basic questions such as computing the annealed free energy. In this paper we rigorously compute the free energy limit (annealed and quenched) for this model at high enough but constant temperature. Our results are in numerical agreement with the results derived by physics methods. Remarkably, though, our method of proof is novel and is different from the physics approach. It is based on (a) the theory of the component structure of sparse random graphs and (b) a variant of the cavity method, used widely in prior rigorous and heuristic treatments of classical spin glasses.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev（SYK）模型是凝聚态物理与黑洞全息理论中研究的一种无序量子平均场模型。其结构性质可通过副本方法与路径积分技术的结合进行启发式推导。然而，即使对于退火自由能计算这类基本问题，对其进行严格数学分析也极为困难。本文在足够高但恒定的温度下，严格计算了该模型的自由能极限（退火与淬火情形）。我们的结果与物理学方法推导的数值结果一致。值得注意的是，我们的证明方法具有创新性，且不同于物理学方法，其基础在于：(a) 稀疏随机图分量结构理论；(b) 空穴方法的一种变体——该方法在经典自旋玻璃的严格与启发式研究中被广泛使用。</p></details> | 2026-05-04 | David Gamarnik et al. |
| 8 | **[Overlap locking and non-perturbative effects in spin glasses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.18399v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We study the phenomenon of the locking of the order parameter (or synchronization) in spin glasses at low temperatures. When two systems with independent disorders are coupled, their overlaps become similar. A crucial question is how this effect depends on the strength of the coupling between the two systems. Non-perturbative phenomena are present when $1 \ll ΔH \ll N$, being $ΔH$ the coupling Hamiltonian and $N$ the size of the system. In this intermediate-coupling region, the effect is related to finite-size free-energy corrections and to the correlations in the Dyson hierarchical spin glass, a model that mimics the physics of finite-dimensional systems. We study this phenomenon in the mean-field approach, both analytically and numerically, and we finally compute the critical exponents for finite-volume corrections in mean-field theory and for the decay of correlations in the Dyson hierarchical model.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了低温下自旋玻璃中序参量的锁定（即同步化）现象。当两个具有独立无序的系统耦合时，它们的重叠会趋于相似。一个关键问题是该效应如何依赖于两系统间的耦合强度。当耦合哈密顿量ΔH满足1 ≪ ΔH ≪ N（N为系统尺寸）时，会出现非微扰现象。在此中间耦合区域，该效应与有限尺寸自由能修正及Dyson层级自旋玻璃（模拟有限维系统物理的模型）中的关联有关。我们通过平均场方法对该现象进行了解析与数值研究，最终计算了平均场理论中有限体积修正的临界指数以及Dyson层级模型中关联衰减的临界指数。</p></details> | 2026-05-03 | Silvio Franz et al. |
| 9 | **[Cavity-mediated localization and collective electron correlation phases](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01551v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Collective strong coupling of molecular ensembles to optical cavities opens a route to modifying matter through genuinely collective electronic correlations. Yet even in the absence of a cavity, Coulomb correlations are notoriously difficult to describe, and cavity coupling adds transverse correlation channels extending over the entire molecular ensemble. Here we show that this seemingly intractable problem admits a controlled description by mapping the collective intermolecular electronic correlations to the analytically solvable spherical Sherrington-Kirkpatrick model. The resulting theory predicts two collective correlation phases, a paracorrelated phase and a spin-glass correlation phase, beyond the conventional uncorrelated molecular regime. These phases reveal an entropy-driven localization-delocalization mechanism that transfers molecular electronic states into collectively correlated cavity-dressed states. Our work establishes cavity-mediated electron correlations as a microscopic mechanism for emergent phases in strongly coupled molecular ensembles.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>分子系综与光学腔的集体强耦合为通过真正集体电子关联修饰物质开辟了途径。然而，即使在没有腔的情况下，库仑关联也极难描述，而腔耦合则增加了延伸至整个分子系综的横向关联通道。本文证明，这一看似棘手的问题可通过将集体分子间电子关联映射至可解析求解的球形Sherrington-Kirkpatrick模型而得到可控描述。由此产生的理论预测了超越传统非关联分子体系的两种集体关联相：副关联相与自旋玻璃关联相。这些相揭示了一种熵驱动的局域-退局域机制，该机制将分子电子态转移至集体关联的腔修饰态。我们的工作确立了腔介导电子关联作为强耦合分子系综中涌现相的微观机制。</p></details> | 2026-05-02 | Dominik Sidler et al. |
